name: SMTP Error Codes
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Errors with invalid or missing required X-Headers result in an immediate bounce code issued from Maropost’s email exchange server. If a transactional email fails further on in the process, then the error will appear in the transactional campaign’s email bounce
